paragraphs.text: Twenty-four suites carved into the Aegean cliffs. Curate your arrival with our concierge — each reservation is personally confirmed within four hours.
Direct bookings receive our promise of transparency, flexibility, and personal service.
A clifftop retreat of twenty-four suites on the Aegean coast. Carved from volcanic stone, kept by the sea.
